title: EPI – Graduate Apprentice – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Engineering Projects India (EPI) Recruitment 2026 for 1 Graduate Apprentice post. BE/B.Tech candidates can apply online through epi.gov.in. The last date has been extended from 21 May 2026 to 05 June 2026. Check eligibility, notification, and apply online details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for EPI Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
